sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: LSV Asset Management Decreases Stock Position in Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. $CHKP
feed.summary: LSV Asset Management significantly reduced its stake in Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ:CHKP) by 69.5% in Q3, selling 16,900 shares and leaving it with 7,400 shares valued at $1.53 million. While Check Point beat EPS expectations and provided strong FY2026 EPS guidance, its revenue slightly missed forecasts. Analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $216, though several have recently lowered their price targets.

feed.title: BofA Lowers its Price Target on Etsy, Inc. (ETSY) to $63 and Maintains a Neutral Rating
feed.summary: BofA has lowered its price target for Etsy, Inc. (ETSY) to $63 from $73, maintaining a Neutral rating, citing recent multiple compressions in the e-commerce sector. This decision comes ahead of Etsy's earnings report scheduled for February 19, 2026. Other analysts, including Stifel and Cantor Fitzgerald, have also recently reduced their price targets on Etsy due to factors like potential pricing pressure and lingering macro concerns.

feed.title: Citi downgrades Braskem S.A. (BAK) to Sell Feb 16 2026
feed.summary: Citigroup downgraded Braskem S.A. (BAK) from Neutral to Sell on February 16, 2026, citing rising downside risks to earnings and sentiment and current catalysts not supporting a Neutral stance. The downgrade, which did not include a new price target, indicates Citi's preference for reduced exposure to Braskem. Investors are advised to reassess position sizing and consider potential increased volatility, although Meyka AI still rates BAK with a grade of B.

feed.title: Japan ENEOS, Equinix ink 121 MW solar VPPA
feed.summary: ENEOS, a Japanese energy company, and Equinix, a global digital infrastructure company, have signed a Virtual Power Purchase Agreement (VPPA) for 121 MW of solar power. This agreement is focused on the Japanese market and contributes to corporate sustainability goals by securing renewable energy. The article was written by Lucas Morais.

feed.title: Dorman Products, Inc. (NASDAQ:DORM) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Dorman Products, Inc. (NASDAQ:DORM) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from six brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $180.50. Recent analyst downgrades have shifted some ratings to "hold." The company's stock has a market cap of $4.01 billion, with corporate insiders owning 8.90% and institutional investors holding 84.70% of shares.

feed.title: Apellis Pharmaceuticals (APLS) Expected to Announce Earnings on Tuesday

feed.title: New York Life Investment Management LLC Reduces Stock Position in JPMorgan Chase & Co. $JPM

feed.title: Elliott said to have built over 10% stake in Norwegian Cruise Line
feed.summary: Activist investor Elliott Investment Management has reportedly acquired over a 10% stake in Norwegian Cruise Line, intending to push for changes to improve the struggling company's performance. The firm plans to engage with Norwegian to address its underperformance compared to rivals like Royal Caribbean and Carnival Corp, potentially suggesting board nominees such as former Royal Caribbean president Adam Goldstein. Elliott aims to enhance both financial performance and guest experience, believing Norwegian has the potential for a successful turnaround.

feed.title: There May Be Reason For Hope In DuPont de Nemours' (NYSE:DD) Disappointing Earnings
feed.summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) recently reported soft earnings, but the market reacted positively due to underlying factors. The company's statutory profit was reduced by US$453m due to unusual, likely one-off items in the last twelve months, suggesting its underlying earnings potential is stronger than reported. Investors are encouraged to look beyond the headline numbers and consider these unusual items.

feed.title: Moody's Corp. (MCO) call put ratio 1 call to 1.7 puts into quarter results

feed.title: Blue Ammonia Market to Reach USD 6,255 Million by 2032 | CAGR
feed.summary: The global Blue Ammonia Market is projected to grow significantly, reaching USD 6,255 million by 2032 from USD 216.74 million in 2024, at a CAGR of 51.60%. This growth is driven by the increasing demand for decarbonization in energy and industry, with key players like CF Industries Holdings, Inc., ADNOC, and Yara International expanding production and investing in carbon capture technologies. The market is segmented by technology, application, end-user, and distribution channel, with regions like the Middle East and Asia Pacific leading in adoption due to abundant natural gas reserves and government mandates.

feed.title: Wedbush Lowers its Price Target on Tripadvisor, Inc. (TRIP) to $15 and Maintains a Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Wedbush analyst Scott Devitt lowered his price target on Tripadvisor, Inc. (TRIP) to $15 from $18, maintaining a Neutral rating, citing the company's strategic shift and increased focus on margin stability and Viator's revenue growth. This follows similar price target reductions from UBS and Cantor Fitzgerald, reflecting a more cautious outlook on TRIP despite an improving sentiment for Global Internet stocks. The article suggests investor attention will be on Tripadvisor's margin trajectory and Viator's ability to reaccelerate revenue.

feed.title: Barclays Raises its Price Target on CytomX Therapeutics, Inc. (CTMX) to $10 and Maintains an Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for CytomX Therapeutics, Inc. (CTMX) to $10 from $8 while maintaining an Overweight rating, following a similar move by Piper Sandler and new coverage initiation by Guggenheim with a Buy rating, both also setting a $10 price target. The positive outlook is primarily driven by promising Phase I data on varsetatug maseatecan, which demonstrated significant anti-tumor activity in metastatic colorectal cancer patients. CytomX is expected to provide further updates on its expansion cohorts soon.

feed.title: BlackRock® Canada Announces February Cash Distributions for the iShares® ETFs
feed.summary: BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited announced the February 2026 cash distributions for its iShares ETFs listed on the TSX or Cboe Canada. Unitholders of record by February 24, 2026, will receive these distributions on February 27, 2026. The announcement includes a detailed list of "per unit" distribution amounts for various iShares ETFs and estimated distributions for the iShares Premium Money Market ETF.

feed.title: Aurubis AG: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG [the German Securities Trading Act] with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
feed.summary: Aurubis AG has released a notification of major holdings, indicating that BlackRock, Inc. has adjusted its voting rights in the company. The notification details BlackRock's direct and indirect voting rights, including those held through various instruments, which now total 3.92%, up from 3.51% previously. The filing also provides a comprehensive chain of BlackRock's controlled undertakings.

feed.title: ChartWatch ASX Scans: Treasury Wine Estates, Telix Pharmaceuticals, Audinate, Accent Group, G50 Corp, Webjet
feed.summary: This article provides daily ASX stock scans based on trend following technical analysis, identifying both strong uptrends and downtrends. Apollo Minerals, BPM Minerals, G50 Corp, Magnetic Resources, Midas Minerals, and Venus Metals are highlighted for uptrends, while Alpha HPA, Audinate, Alliance Aviation, Accent Group, Brainchip, Beetaloo Energy, Myer, Telix Pharmaceuticals, Treasury Wine Estates, and Webjet are noted for downtrends. The author, Carl Capolingua, emphasizes that these lists are for educational purposes and not recommendations, encouraging readers to perform their own research.

feed.title: CeriBell (CBLL) Projected to Post Earnings on Tuesday

Analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for CeriBell, with an average price target of $24.67.

feed.title: Eni makes Calao South discovery offshore Côte d’Ivoire’s CI-501
feed.summary: Eni has announced a significant gas and condensate discovery, dubbed Calao South, in Block CI-501 offshore Côte d’Ivoire. The discovery, with estimated volumes up to 5 trillion cubic feet of gas and 450 million barrels of condensate, represents the second-largest find in the country after the Eni-operated Baleine field. Eni holds a 90% operating stake in the block, with Petroci Holding owning the remaining 10%.

feed.title: Delaware Supreme Court revives insurer claims in Blackbaud ransomware case
feed.summary: The Delaware Supreme Court has revived subrogation claims by insurers against Blackbaud, Inc., reversing a lower court's dismissal. This ruling puts over $2.1 million in insurer payouts to 97 policyholders back in play, stemming from Blackbaud's 2020 ransomware attack and alleged failure to properly handle the data breach. The case will now return to the Superior Court for further proceedings.

feed.title: MSCI Stock Jumps on Earnings Beat: Can Premium Valuation Still Hold?
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. has reported an earnings beat and raised its guidance, reinforcing its premium valuation in the market. The company's business model, heavily reliant on index-linked fees and ESG data, continues to show strong growth, particularly within the US ETF market. Despite its strong performance and essential role in global investing, the stock's high valuation and potential regulatory challenges regarding ESG products are key considerations for investors.

feed.title: Raymond James upgrades Marsh stock rating on valuation reset
feed.summary: Raymond James has upgraded Marsh (NYSE:MRSH) to Strong Buy from Outperform, despite lowering its price target to $225 from $240. The upgrade reflects a valuation reset after the stock fell 17% in six months, now trading at approximately 17 times 2026 estimated earnings, and is seen as undervalued by InvestingPro's Fair Value model. Raymond James cited Marsh's high-quality earnings, margin expansion, strong credit signal, and leadership position as key reasons for the improved rating.

feed.title: Apple Challenges Netflix, YouTube And Spotify With New Video Podcasting Feature
feed.summary: Apple Inc. is introducing a new integrated video podcast experience to its Apple Podcasts app this spring, aiming to compete with streaming giants like Netflix, YouTube, and Spotify. This feature will allow creators more control, enhance user experience with picture-in-picture support, and enable offline viewing, while also using Apple's HLS streaming protocol for adaptive playback and dynamic video ad insertion. The move is part of Apple's broader strategy to bolster its streaming segment, positioning it against established video and audio content platforms.
